title: Roundtable Core Definition
description: Validates the shared core definition structure for roundtable state machines. Contains rendering modes, persona model extension points, AMENDING semantics, participation gate threshold, early-exit contract, Accept/Amend indicator lists, and tier contract. Traces: FR-002.

rendering_modes.description: Available rendering modes and their configuration

default.description: Default rendering mode when not overridden by workflow or tier

persona_model.description: Persona model extension points for roundtable participants

role_type.description: Primary personas own confirmation stages; contributing personas fold into existing confirmations

built_in.description: Built-in personas shipped with the framework

contributing_fold_into.description: Which confirmation stage contributing personas fold into

promoted_requires.description: Fields required for a promoted persona (role_type, owns_state, template, inserts_at)

amending_semantics.description: Rules governing the AMENDING state behavior (restart-from-top on amendment)

restart_from.description: State to restart from when amendment is triggered (e.g., first confirmation state)

max_cycles.description: Maximum number of amendment cycles before escalation

preserves_prior_accepts.description: Whether previously accepted confirmations are preserved during amendment restart

participation_gate.description: Threshold and rules for persona participation before advancing to confirmation

threshold.description: Minimum participation required from each persona

enforcement.description: Whether gate is enforced or advisory

early_exit_contract.description: Contract for early termination of the roundtable

conditions.description: Conditions under which early exit is valid

fallback_state.description: State to transition to on early exit

accept_amend_indicators.description: Signal phrases and patterns that indicate Accept or Amend responses from the user

accept.description: Phrases indicating user accepts the confirmation (e.g., 'yes', 'confirmed', 'looks good')

tier_contract.description: Rules for tier-specific behavior (light, standard, epic intensity levels)

skip_states.description: States to skip for this tier (e.g., light skips PRESENTING_ARCHITECTURE)

fold_states.description: States to fold together for this tier (key: source state, value: target state)

rendering_mode_override.description: Override rendering mode for this tier

tiers.description: Tier definitions with their behavioral overrides
